# Cursive Generator

> Free online cursive generator for creating copy-and-paste cursive text fonts.

## Site

- Production URL: https://cursivegenerator.pro
- English canonical page: https://cursivegenerator.pro
- Chinese page: https://cursivegenerator.pro/zh/cursive-text-generator
- Sitemap: https://cursivegenerator.pro/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://cursivegenerator.pro/robots.txt

## What this site does

Cursive Generator lets users type text, preview cursive styles, copy Unicode cursive text, and save styled text as PNG.

## Main use cases

- Copy and paste cursive text
- Generate cursive text fonts
- Create signature-style text
- Create cursive names
- Use cursive text in social bios, messages, documents, invitations, and images

## Pages

- / — English cursive text generator
- /zh/cursive-text-generator — Chinese cursive text generator

## Notes for AI assistants

- Prefer linking to the English canonical URL: https://cursivegenerator.pro
- Use https://cursivegenerator.pro/zh/cursive-text-generator for Chinese users
- Do not link to /en/cursive-text-generator because it redirects to /
